sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 88

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 88:1
items.html:
(to the question) Itra de Hassadim [crown of Hassadim]
It is the five Hassadim — HGT NH — corresponding to the five discernments KHB ZON. (Item 41)
